name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe Filter
description: Floral and citrus-forward single-origin coffee with a tea-like body, ideal for pour-over.

name: Colombia Huila Espresso
description: Balanced espresso profile with caramel sweetness, red fruit, and smooth finish.

name: House Blend
description: Approachable daily blend with chocolate and roasted nut notes for multiple brew methods.

name: Kenya AA Nyeri
description: Juicy blackcurrant and grapefruit with sparkling acidity and clean sweetness.

name: Brazil Cerrado Natural
description: Chocolate-heavy cup with hazelnut sweetness and low acidity, great for milk drinks.

name: Guatemala Huehuetenango
description: Sweet stone fruit and cocoa in a medium-bodied cup for filter and AeroPress.

name: Decaf Colombia Sugarcane
description: Full-flavored decaf with toffee sweetness and gentle citrus, no compromise cup.

name: Rwanda Nyamasheke
description: Red apple and black tea notes with silky mouthfeel and elegant finish.

name: Morning Espresso Blend
description: Classic espresso blend with dark chocolate body and syrupy crema.

name: Peru Cajamarca
description: Brown sugar and plum notes with balanced acidity and clean finish.

name: Costa Rica Tarrazu
description: Honey sweetness, orange peel, and milk chocolate in a versatile profile.

name: Ethiopia Guji Natural
description: Jammy blueberry and tropical fruit notes with perfumed aromatics.

name: Weekend Blend
description: Comforting cup with cocoa, biscuit sweetness, and low bitterness.

name: India Monsooned Malabar
description: Low-acid and heavy-bodied coffee with spice and dark cocoa characteristics.

name: Burundi Kayanza
description: Bright and lively cup with citrus zest and black tea complexity.

name: Signature Espresso
description: Sweet and creamy espresso with toffee, cocoa nib, and cherry finish.

name: Nicaragua Jinotega
description: Soft caramel sweetness and stone-fruit notes with rounded body.

name: Panama Geisha Reserve
description: Delicate jasmine aromatics with bergamot and honeyed sweetness.

name: Uganda Sipi Falls
description: Rich and syrupy with dark fruit and cocoa undertones.

name: Mexico Chiapas Decaf
description: Smooth decaf with milk chocolate and orange sweetness.

name: El Salvador Santa Ana
description: Creamy profile with praline sweetness and soft apple acidity.

name: Daily Drip Blend
description: Easy-drinking blend for batch brew with cocoa and caramel notes.

name: Tanzania Kilimanjaro
description: Crisp acidity with black tea and berry notes, excellent for V60.

name: Honduras Marcala
description: Round sweetness and cocoa with gentle citrus finish.

name: Bolivia La Paz
description: Elegant cup featuring panela sweetness, pear, and milk chocolate.

name: Espresso Dark Roast
description: Bold and intense with bittersweet chocolate and toasted almond.

name: Papua New Guinea Sigri
description: Silky body with tropical fruit and cocoa finish.

name: Costa Rica Honey Process
description: Honey-processed sweetness with orange blossom aromatics.

name: Cold Brew Blend
description: Designed for cold brew with smooth chocolate body and low acidity.

name: Ethiopia Sidama Espresso
description: Vibrant espresso with blueberry jam, milk chocolate, and jasmine aromatics.
